topic: AI Agent SaaS Competitive Scan — Pricing & Positioning (Updated)
bullets: === MARKET SIZE ===
AI agent market: $7.84B in 2025, projected $52.62B by 2030 (41% CAGR)
Orgs spent avg $1.2M on AI-native apps in 2025, up 108% YoY (Zylo SaaS Management Index)
By end of 2026, 40% of enterprise apps will integrate task-specific AI agents (up from 5% in 2025)
AI agent startups captured $15B+ in funding in 2025 alone
=== TIER 1: ENTERPRISE HEAVYWEIGHTS ===
Kore.ai — Custom enterprise pricing. Omnichannel conversational + workflow orchestration. 400+ Fortune 2000 clients. Gartner-recognized.
Salesforce Agentforce — $2/conversation, $0.10/action (Flex Credits), or $125/user/month. Massive existing customer base lock-in.
Microsoft Copilot Studio — Copilot licences + consumption credits. Deep M365 ecosystem integration and compliance.
IBM watsonx.ai — Custom enterprise pricing. AI model development with private data training and governance controls.
Glean — Custom enterprise pricing. Knowledge retrieval and workflow automation across disconnected enterprise tools.
=== TIER 2: FUNDED STARTUPS (DIRECT COMPETITORS) ===
Sierra AI — Outcome-based pricing (pay per successful resolution). Hit $100M ARR in 21 months. Customer service focus.
Wonderful — $2B valuation, $150M Series B. AI customer service agents at scale.
Rox AI — $1.2B valuation (Mar 2026). Autonomous AI sales agents.
Cursor — $3B valuation, $400M raised Jan 2026. AI-native coding environment, full-stack generation from natural language.
Decagon — Custom pricing. Enterprise support automation using Agent Operating Procedures. Model-agnostic.
Lindy AI — Free / $49.99 Pro / $199.99 Business per month. No-code multi-agent workflows for email, meetings, CRM.
Sintra AI — $97/mo. All-in-one business automation with 12 specialised AI agents.
Harvey — Custom pricing. Legal workflow automation (contracts, research, document analysis).
Armadin — $190M raise (Mar 2026, Mandiant founder). Autonomous cybersecurity agents.
=== TIER 3: DEVELOPER FRAMEWORKS ===
CrewAI — Free (MIT OSS) / $99/mo managed. Python multi-agent framework. 90k+ GitHub stars.
AutoGen (Microsoft) — Free (MIT). 170k+ GitHub stars. Visual Agent Builder in 2026.
LangGraph/LangChain — MIT core. LangSmith $39/seat/mo for observability. Graph-based orchestration.
=== TIER 4: NO-CODE / AUTOMATION PLATFORMS ===
Arahi AI — Free + usage-based. No-code, 2,800+ integrations, 200+ templates.
Zapier — Free / from $19.99/mo. 7,000+ app connections. Simple trigger-based automations.
Make — Free / from $10.59/mo. Complex visual workflows with branching logic.
n8n — Free OSS / $24/mo cloud. Self-hostable. Developer-focused.
Gumloop — Free / $37/mo Solo. Slack-first AI workflows.
Relevance AI — Free / from $19/mo. Data-heavy ops and analytics automation.
=== CUSTOMER SUPPORT AGENTS ===
Intercom Fin — $74/mo base + $0.99/resolved issue (outcome-based component).
Zendesk Answer Bot — $50/agent/month. ~30% ticket deflection.
Freshworks — $29/agent/month. SMB-focused.
=== SALES & MARKETING AGENTS ===
Clay — $149-$800/mo. Prospect research + email personalisation.
Instantly AI — $37-$358/mo. Email automation and optimisation.
HubSpot AI — $45/mo basic, $800+/mo Professional tier.
=== VOICE AI ===
Synthflow — $29-$299/mo. Voice automation.
Bland AI — $0.09/min. Voice interactions.
Vapi — From $0.05/min. Enterprise discounts available.
=== DEV TOOLS ===
GitHub Copilot — $10-$19/user/month.
Devin AI — $20 Core / $500 Team per month. Autonomous software development.
=== PRICING MODEL TRENDS ===
Per-conversation: $0.05-$2.00 (Salesforce $2, Zendesk $1.50, Intercom $0.99)
Per-action/token: $0.10+ per action (Salesforce Flex Credits)
Outcome-based: Pay per successful resolution — fastest growing model (Sierra, Intercom Fin, Zendesk AI)
Per-seat subscription: $10-$500/user/month (wide range by vertical)
Hybrid (base + usage): Dominant model in 2026. Free tier standard for adoption.
Deloitte predicts outcome-based pricing will reshape SaaS budgets by 2027
=== STRATEGIC GAPS / OPPORTUNITIES ===
No competitor offers a unified AI HQ combining agent orchestration + consciousness/self-improvement + revenue ops in one dashboard
Most platforms are vertical-specific (CX, sales, dev) — no general-purpose autonomous agent command centre exists
Self-hosted/on-premise options rare outside n8n and enterprise tiers — privacy-first positioning underserved
Agent marketplaces are nascent — bundling marketplace with orchestration platform is a blue ocean play
Outcome-based pricing is growing but few startups have adopted it — early mover advantage available
